summary: Successfully verified SelectItem fix and completed comprehensive testing of MyBase Personal Life OS. All critical SelectItem issues have been resolved. Frontend CRUD operations now work correctly. Portfolio calculations display properly with real-time P&L tracking.
passed_tests: SelectItem fix verification - no more empty string errors
Create inventory item via form with SelectItem components
Create task via form with project and priority SelectItems
Portfolio gain/loss calculation displays correctly (28,500€ invested, 31,000€ current, +2,500€ gain, +8.77% performance)
Portfolio asset creation with crypto type SelectItem
Navigation to all pages (Dashboard, Collections, Inventory, Wishlist/Liste de souhaits, Projects, Content, Portfolio)
Real-time dashboard stats updates showing created items
